action_set_definitions.name: get_case_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the core details of a specific fraud case, including the associated user ID and current investigation status.

case_id.description: The unique identifier for the case (e.g., 'CASE-5502').

action_set_definitions.name: get_customer_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves internal records regarding a user's behavior, risk scores, and historical transaction success rates.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

action_set_definitions.name: get_transaction_history
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the transaction ledger for all records associated with a user to identify the original charge and any subsequent refunds or duplicate credits.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

action_set_definitions.name: get_evidence_vault
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses the digital evidence related to a case, such as proof of delivery, IP logs, and communication records.

case_id.description: The unique identifier for the case.

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_dispute
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the investigation by submitting a formal resolution. This updates the case status and determines the financial outcome.

case_id.description: The unique identifier for the case.

resolution_action.description: The action to take: CHALLENGE (if evidence is strong), ACCEPT (if fraud is likely), or REFUNDED_ALREADY (to prevent double payment).

justification.description: Detailed reasoning based on the audit of ledger and evidence.

state_description.case_id: Unique identifier for the current fraud investigation case.
state_description.customer_profile: Internal record of the customer's known behavior, risk score, and historical activity.
state_description.transaction_ledger: The 'ground truth' list of all transactions associated with the account, including hidden labels.
state_description.evidence_vault: Information already uncovered by the investigator that affects subsequent observations.
state_description.is_fraud_ground_truth: The hidden fact of whether the case actually involves fraud (used to maintain simulation consistency).

transaction_ledger.description: Customer return processed via automated portal
